steps.title: Find the hourly rate
steps.content: The rate is dollars per hour: $$\text{rate} = \frac{p}{w}$$ dollars per hour.

steps.title: Calculate earnings for 39w hours
steps.content: For $39w$ hours, multiply the rate by the time: $$\frac{p}{w} \times 39w = 39p$$ dollars. That matches choice A — A is correct.
